name: JoAi: Create Project

description.en: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.de: Erstelle ein neues Projekt für deinen Agenten, um Arbeit, Content-Produktion oder laufende Initiativen zu organisieren.
description.es: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.fr: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.ro: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.it: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.

bot: Use this when the user wants to start a new project. Help them define a clear name and purpose.

inputs.bot: A concise name for this project (e.g., 'Q2 Marketing Campaign', 'Product Launch').

inputs.name: Brief

description.en: Creative brief or description of this project
description.es: Creative brief or description of this project
description.fr: Creative brief or description of this project
description.ro: Creative brief or description of this project
description.it: Creative brief or description of this project

inputs.bot: A short creative brief outlining this project's goals and scope.
